summary.text: A man wearing a black cap and a black t-shirt featuring a large red and white "TR" logo with "TON" text stands in a kitchen. Initially [0-2], his lips are pursed before opening wide into a smile with outward arm gestures. He then [2-4] tilts his head and gestures forward with his right hand. Transitioning [4-6], he purses his lips again while raising open palms, then [6-8] opens his mouth wide to speak emphatically as hands lower. Finally [8-12], he shifts from squinting to tilting his head right and opening his mouth, ending with lips pursed in an 'O' shape. Wooden cabinets and a stainless steel refrigerator remain visible behind him.

[14-18] A man wearing a black cap and a black t-shirt with a red and white "TR" logo lowers his hands, smiles showing teeth, and turns his head slightly right before facing forward. He opens his mouth wide as if speaking, briefly raising his hands. [18-22] He maintains a broad, open-mouthed smile facing the camera in a kitchen with wooden cabinets and a stainless steel refrigerator.
